_comment: Manual data corrections. Applied on top of any CSV or preloaded data. Never overwritten by data rebuilds.

group_creates.name: RESOLUTE DENTAL PARTNERS
group_creates.note: Dr. Toback CEO. Steve D Patterson account. ~$14K FY PY. Graniteville growing fast after lunch and learn.

group_creates.name: ABRA DENTAL
group_creates.note: All 4 CT locations acquired by Abra Dental NJ. Revenue ~$14.5K gross Q1 PY all via Schein. Benco child (Master-CM9814079) ~$492 FY — same Stamford address. Rich Foti was CT Schein rep, NJ rep took over post-acquisition. Dr. Helene Strazza (Norwalk + Danbury) only active buyer 2026.

Abra Dental Group — 4 CT locations acquired by Abra Dental NJ. ALL revenue flows through Schein (~$14.5K gross Q1 PY). Schein CT rep was Rich Foti — NJ Schein rep took control post-acquisition. Dr. Helene Strazza (Norwalk + Danbury) is the only active buyer in 2026. Best entry point is direct relationship with Dr. Strazza. YoY down 88%.
